overall.description: First-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a dark rural area at night toward a medieval stone manor house. The player holds a wooden staff or torch that illuminates the dirt path, and encounters an NPC carrying a lantern walking in the same direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural approach path to medieval manor

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a dirt path toward a distant medieval manor house, holding a wooden staff that illuminates the immediate area

entered.detail: large stone building with multiple towers visible in the distance against the night sky
unpaved dirt trail winding through grassy terrain, illuminated by the player's light source
wooden staff or torch handle held in the left hand, providing warm orange illumination
low shrubbery and vegetation lining the sides of the dirt path

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a dark dirt path through open rural terrain at night, holding a wooden staff that casts a warm glow on the ground. A medieval stone manor house with towers is visible in the distance ahead, silhouetted against the cloudy night sky.

events.description: NPC carrying a lantern appears ahead on the path, walking in the same direction
player passes the NPC on the right as the NPC moves to the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing an NPC who is walking ahead carrying a lantern, maintaining a steady pace along the path

notable_agents.action: walking ahead on the path carrying a lit lantern, then moving to the left side to let the player pass

entered.detail: wooden cart or wagon with visible wheel parked on the left side of the path near the manor

segments.scene_description: As the player continues toward the manor, an NPC carrying a lantern becomes visible ahead walking in the same direction. The player approaches and passes the NPC on the right while a wooden cart comes into view on the left side of the path. The manor house grows larger in the frame as the distance closes.

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dirt path toward the manor building after passing the NPC, with the cart now behind

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds along the path alone after passing both the NPC and the wooden cart. The manor house now dominates the left side of the frame as the player approaches closer, with bushes and vegetation visible along the path edges in the torchlight.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark rural path that leads from an open landscape toward the imposing presence of a medieval stone manor. It begins with the camera moving forward through the night, guided by the warm glow of a wooden staff that illuminates the dirt ground while the manor's towers remain distant silhouettes against a cloudy sky. As the camera advances, the scene shifts to include an NPC carrying a lantern walking ahead, whom the player passes on the right just as a wooden cart appears on the left. The perspective then continues alone along the path, with the torchlight revealing bushes and vegetation at the edges. Finally, the manor house expands to dominate the left side of the frame as the camera draws closer to the massive stone structure.
